allow: Bash(/opt/homebrew/bin/python3.11 -c "from nashguard.config import Config; c = Config\(\); print\('has_llm_key:', c.has_llm_key\); print\('has_okx:', c.has_okx_credentials\); print\('demo_mode:', c.demo_mode\)")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/bin/python3.11 -c "import nashguard; print\('Import OK'\); from nashguard.sandbox.drb import DRBSandbox; from nashguard.config import Config; c = Config\(\); d = DRBSandbox\(c.risk_params, c.key_store_path\); print\('DRBSandbox OK'\)" 2>&1)
